answers.answer: A) We have validated up to 5 million events/sec in our benchmarks. For 50M, I would need to assess the architecture with our team and get back to you with a concrete answer and proof-of-concept within a week. This answer is honest about what we know, admits uncertainty without undermining confidence, and commits to a specific follow-up with timeline.

Thank you for your candid feedback. You are right - my singleton suggestion yesterday did not account for the dependency injection patterns used throughout your codebase, and that was my mistake. I want to better understand your architecture patterns so I can provide more relevant suggestions. Could you share some examples of your DI container configuration or recommend code samples for me to study? This will help me avoid generating boilerplate that does not match your patterns in the future. I am committed to providing valuable suggestions, but I clearly have room to improve. Your feedback helps me recognize that I need to understand specific project context more deeply rather than relying on generic patterns.
